title: BEM-917 protocol record

Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: update the BEM-916 unified system improvement protocol according to operator remarks about Telegram configuration, report periodicity and report canon.
Base:
- BEM-916 unified system improvement protocol remains the base protocol.
- BEM-917 updates BEM-916; it is not a standalone Telegram protocol.
Worker agreement:
- Request: governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM917_UNIFIED_PROTOCOL_V2_REQUEST.md

Required corrections included:
1. Telegram target:
- Telegram Operator Interface is configured to General Director object OBJ-GD-001.
- The receiving element is EL-CUR-GD-001, the Curator of the General Director.
- Route: Operator -> Telegram -> EL-CUR-GD-001 -> OBJ-GD-001 -> Director/Worker through managed channel.
2. Report periodicity:
- Reports are sent with operator-selected periodicity.
- Default report period is 1 hour.
- Operator may change period later through command or configuration.
- Period changes must not introduce prohibited schedule triggers without operator approval.
3. Report canon:
- All Telegram reports must follow the canonical report format: BEM title, date/time, stage X/Y percent, roadmap X/Y percent, checklist with proof, next-action table.
- Curator, Director and General Director reports use the same canon with role-specific content.

- Channel and event log hardening.
- Architecture canon freshness.
- Telegram Operator Interface.
- Claude re-audit package.
